step_rationale: Integrated measure of coagulation cascade capacity; reflects thrombin generation potential.
mechanism: Elevated endogenous thrombin potential indicates heightened coagulation capacity promoting thrombus formation.

references.title: Combined complement and coagulation activation in ST-elevation myocardial infarction: associations with myocardial injury and dysfunction.
The utility of coagulation activity for prediction of risk of mortality and cardiovascular events in guideline-treated myocardial infarction patients.
Increased plasma thrombin potential is associated with stable coronary artery disease: An angiographically-controlled study.
